text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I hate to bother you, but the library is about to
close... Would you mind reading the rest of that
chapter in your own room?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I completely lost track of time. I do apologize
for the trouble.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...Come to think of it, I forgot to eat lunch today
as well.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
You've been so focused, sitting there reading all
morning and afternoon.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
That said, I know how it feels. I often get so
absorbed in literature that I forget to eat meals
or even go to bed at night.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It's almost as if the books themselves are so
nutritious that they keep you from getting
hungry. Don't you agree?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but please eat properly, okay? And
remember to take breaks, too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Understood. Thank you for looking out for my
well-being.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...This phenomenon of blocking hunger by concentrating
on books may prove useful for maintaining my figure.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I've actually gained weight recently, so if I can use this
technique to prevent unnecessary snacking...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, after coming up with a "reading diet,"
Mejiro Ardan successfully reaches her goal
weight.
